schemes.name: PM-KISAN
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with up to 2 hectares of land.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.benefit: Crop insurance against natural calamities, pests & diseases.
schemes.eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops.

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.eligibility: All farmers, individuals/joint borrowers, tenant farmers.

schemes.name: Mukhyamantri Kisan Sahay Yojana
schemes.benefit: Compensation for crop loss due to drought or unseasonal rain.
schemes.eligibility: Farmers of Gujarat state for specific Kharif crops.

schemes.name: Gujarat Saat Phera Samuh Lagna Yojana
schemes.benefit: Financial assistance for mass marriages in farmer families.

schemes.name: Subsidy on Tractor/Farm Machinery
schemes.benefit: 25% to 50% subsidy on purchase of new tractors.
schemes.eligibility: Small and marginal farmers of Gujarat.
